sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Press Release: Knife River Corporation Announces First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call

Interested parties can access the webcast or dial into the conference call using the provided details.

feed.title: CMS Energy (CMS) Projected to Post Quarterly Earnings on Tuesday

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand Inc stock (US45687V1061): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: The article discusses how Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is revolutionizing how investors track stocks like Ingersoll Rand Inc (IR). By proactively delivering tailored content based on user interests, Discover provides mobile-first insights into industrial trends, equipment updates, and market drivers before users even search. This shift, emphasizing E-E-A-T content and visual aids, offers a significant advantage to investors who primarily use their phones for market updates, providing dense and actionable information on companies like Ingersoll Rand.

feed.title: Berenberg initiates Palo Alto Networks stock with buy rating By Investing.com
feed.summary: Berenberg has initiated coverage on Palo Alto Networks Inc (NASDAQ:PANW) with a Buy rating and a price target of $215.00, implying a 27% upside. Analysts view Palo Alto Networks as a quality compounder in cybersecurity, strategically positioned for growth with its strong product breadth and execution, especially with AI as the next technological inflection point. The company has demonstrated impressive financial growth and a shift towards recurring revenue, and has recently acquired AI security firm Koi for approximately $400 million.

feed.title: Public Storage stock (US7453271057): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update significantly changes how retail investors receive information on stocks like Public Storage (PSA). This update prioritizes mobile-first, tailored content based on individual browsing activity, delivering insights on self-storage trends, REIT performance, and real estate leasing directly to users' feeds. For Public Storage investors, this means faster access to data on occupancy rates, FFO metrics, and acquisition strategies, enhancing the ability to spot market inflection points without traditional searches.

feed.title: ITOT ETF Declines 0.1%
feed.summary: The ITOT ETF declined by 0.1% today, trading at $110.15 per share. The fund has a 50-day moving average of $109.84 and a 200-day moving average of $105.74, with a 1-year low of $92.65 and a 1-year high of $110.49.

feed.title: Technogen, Inc. Achieves ServiceNow Premier Consulting & Implementation Partner Status
feed.summary: Technogen, Inc. has been recognized as a ServiceNow Premier Consulting & Implementation Partner, a significant achievement highlighting its expertise in delivering digital workflow solutions. The company boasts nearly 100 ServiceNow certified professionals and a 5/5 customer satisfaction rating, focusing on streamlining operations and enhancing IT service management for clients. This new status positions Technogen for accelerated growth and innovation in the US market, particularly in the BFSI and enterprise technology sectors, by providing end-to-end workflow automation and cloud-based solutions.

feed.title: InterDigital (NASDAQ: IDCC) to Hold Virtual Meeting June 10; Bylaws Vote
feed.summary: InterDigital, Inc. (IDCC) will hold its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders virtually on June 10, 2026, where shareholders will vote on the election of eight directors, an amendment to the bylaws to permit officer exculpation, an advisory "say-on-pay" resolution for executive compensation, and the ratification of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm. The Board recommends voting for all proposals and emphasizes the goal of aligning executive and shareholder interests through its compensation structure. The company achieved significant financial and operational results in 2025, including $834 million in revenue and 66% total shareholder return.

feed.title: Applied Materials Announces Advantest as Innovation Partner for EPIC Platform in Silicon Valley
feed.summary: Applied Materials has announced Advantest as an innovation partner for its EPIC platform in Silicon Valley. This collaboration aims to bridge the gap between front-end semiconductor manufacturing and back-end testing, accelerating the development of advanced packaging technologies. Advantest will establish a new Innovation Center co-located with Applied's EPIC Center to foster co-innovation and improve the integration of manufacturing processes, metrology, inspection, and final device testing for next-generation chips.

feed.title: Experts Back Single-Company Merger of Korea's Five Power Generators
feed.summary: Experts are advocating for the merger of South Korea's five state-run power generation companies into a single entity with three divisions to stabilize the energy transition and enhance public interest in the energy sector. A survey indicates that 73.5% of employees at these five power generators support a single-company merger. The proposal aims to address inefficiencies and a decline in the public-sector electricity output's impact on GDP that resulted from the 2001 split of Korea Electric Power Corp.'s generation arm.

feed.title: Kingsway Financial stock (US4993691060): Why does its specialty insurance niche matter more for U.S.
feed.summary: Kingsway Financial, a company focused on specialty insurance like non-standard auto and extended warranties, offers stability in volatile markets. This niche approach allows for higher pricing power and consistent cash flows, appealing to investors seeking resilient service sectors. While analyst coverage is limited, its disciplined growth strategy and capital management suggest potential for long-term value, despite risks related to reserves and competition.

feed.title: Rothschild Redburn Upgrades Colgate-Palmolive Company (CL) to Buy
feed.summary: Rothschild Redburn has upgraded Colgate-Palmolive Company (CL) from Neutral to Buy, increasing its price target from $93.00 to $100.00. The analyst cited Colgate's resilient growth in key divisions like Latin America and Hill's, its strong ability to drive pricing and productivity, and an attractive valuation relative to its historical averages, especially in the context of global economic concerns. This upgrade comes as the Home & Personal Care sector has faced headwinds following a recent geopolitical event.

feed.title: Applied, Advantest link Silicon Valley labs to speed chip design
feed.summary: Applied Materials (NASDAQ: AMAT) announced that Advantest will join its EPIC platform as an innovation partner, integrating a new Advantest Innovation Center on Applied’s Silicon Valley R&D campus. This collaboration aims to accelerate next-generation semiconductor and 3D advanced packaging commercialization by streamlining front-end manufacturing and back-end testing workflows. The EPIC Center is targeted to become operational in 2026, facilitating enhanced integration and efficiency for chipmakers.

feed.title: Applied Materials Announces Advantest as Innovation Partner for EPIC Platform in Silicon Valley
feed.summary: Applied Materials has announced that Advantest Corporation will join its EPIC platform as an innovation partner. This collaboration aims to bridge the gap between front-end manufacturing and back-end testing for semiconductors and advanced packaging, accelerating the time to market for new chip designs. Advantest will establish a new Innovation Center co-located with Applied's EPIC Center in Silicon Valley to facilitate this co-innovation.

feed.title: Real-time uncertainty analysis enhances geosteering confidence
feed.summary: SLB's ensemble-based deterministic inversion (DPI) methodology offers real-time uncertainty quantification for subsurface resistivity mapping, significantly improving geosteering accuracy and reducing operational risks. This approach generates confidence intervals for key layer properties, allowing operators to make better-informed well placement decisions while minimizing computational demands. It has proven effective in both synthetic and field-case studies, enhancing confidence and optimizing reservoir exposure.

feed.title: Jabil Inc stock (US47759T1007): Is AI infrastructure demand strong enough to drive sustained growth?
feed.summary: Jabil Inc (US47759T1007) is strategically positioned to capitalize on the growing demand for AI infrastructure, owing to its electronics manufacturing expertise and diversified service offerings across various high-growth industries like healthcare, automotive, and cloud. The company's global footprint, investment in advanced automation, and focus on sustainability reinforce its competitive edge and appeal to investors seeking exposure to AI without direct bets on volatile chipmakers. While Jabil faces risks such as supply chain disruptions and market cyclicality, its strong execution, strategic partnerships, and stable dividend policy offer potential for sustained growth and resilience in investor portfolios.

feed.title: Summit Hotel Properties (NYSE:INN) Share Price Passes Above Two Hundred Day Moving Average - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Summit Hotel Properties (NYSE:INN) saw its shares trade above its 200-day moving average, reaching $4.86, though analyst sentiment remains mixed with an average "Reduce" rating. The company reported a quarterly EPS miss and has a negative payout ratio despite a 6.6% dividend yield, with FY2026 EPS guidance set between $0.73 and $0.85. Institutional investors have adjusted their holdings, with 96.47% of the stock owned by hedge funds and other large investors.

feed.title: Boeing Composites Malaysia Union Busting and Workers' Rights
feed.summary: Workers at Boeing Composites Malaysia (BCM) overwhelmingly voted to join a union in December 2025, but the company is challenging the result in court. BCM management is accused of pressuring workers to sign a petition against the union, which the National Union of Transport Equipment and Allied Industries Workers (NUTEAIW) claims is illegal interference in the democratic process. IndustriALL Global Union supports NUTEAIW and urges the Malaysian government to intervene and ensure BCM recognizes the union.

feed.title: Nucor extends HRC price increase streak
feed.summary: Nucor Corporation, the largest steel producer in the US, has increased its hot-rolled coil (HRC) consumer spot price by US$10 per short ton, reaching US$1,055. This marks the 13th consecutive week of price increases, resulting in a 20.6% rise over the last six months. Pricing at its California Steel Industries facility also saw a US$10 increase to US$1,105 per short ton, while lead times for HRC delivery remain steady at three to five weeks.

feed.title: Technological innovation and realization of social values that open the future of Korea are on track..
feed.summary: Public institutions in Korea are leading technological innovation and social value creation, contributing to national challenges such as carbon neutrality and welfare. Korea Electric Power Corporation (KEPCO) has localized eco-friendly insulation oil and deployed pollution reduction technologies, while Korea Hydro & Nuclear Power (KHNP) has maintained a zero-disaster record. Other initiatives include the Korea Gas Corporation's administrative innovations and the National Water Industry Cluster's support for promising water companies, alongside efforts to strengthen social safety nets through collaborations like the Korea Social Welfare Council and the Korea Social Security Information Service.

feed.title: Alley Investment Management Company LLC Purchases 5,582 Shares of Parker-Hannifin Corporation $PH
feed.summary: Alley Investment Management Company LLC increased its stake in Parker-Hannifin Corporation by 40.8% in Q4, holding 19,263 shares valued at $16.93 million. This comes as analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $1,000.60, and Parker-Hannifin reported strong quarterly earnings with 9.1% revenue growth and $7.65 EPS. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $1.80 per share.

feed.title: iQiyi bets on AI to power majority of content within five years, launches Nadou Pro filmmaking suite
feed.summary: Chinese streaming giant iQiyi plans for artificial intelligence to generate the majority of its films and shows within the next five years, aiming to reverse a multi-year revenue slump. The company has launched Nadou Pro, an AI toolkit that covers nearly the entire filmmaking workflow, and intends to reward AI creators with an additional 20% share of advertising and membership revenue to encourage adoption. iQiyi also plans to transform its platform into a social-media-style hub for AI-generated content and expects a commercially successful AI-generated film as early as this summer.

feed.title: Targa Resources Corp stock (US87612G1013): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is significantly changing how investors receive information on stocks like Targa Resources Corp (NYSE: TRGP). This update provides tailored, mobile-first insights directly in Google Discover feeds, bypassing traditional search for faster access to midstream energy trends and company-specific updates. For Targa, this means proactive intelligence on Permian Basin activities, NGL logistics, and financial performance, enabling investors to stay ahead in volatile energy markets without extensive research.

feed.title: ICICI Bank Ltd. Sees Robust Value Trading Amid Institutional Interest
feed.summary: ICICI Bank Ltd. demonstrated robust value trading on April 21, 2026, with significant institutional interest and sustained buying momentum. The stock's price increased by 1.05%, outperforming the Sensex, and exhibits short-to-medium-term bullishness based on moving averages. MarketsMOJO recently upgraded its rating from Sell to Hold, indicating a stabilizing performance and making it a key stock to observe for balanced portfolios.

feed.title: Indivior PLC stock (GB00BYZ0C031): Is its opioid treatment focus strong enough for steady investor returns?
feed.summary: Indivior PLC specializes in addiction treatments, particularly for opioid use disorder, positioning itself in the expanding behavioral health sector. The company's core business model focuses on patented medications with novel delivery technologies, primarily generating revenue in North America but with global scalability. While facing competitive and regulatory pressures, Indivior aims for steady investor returns by focusing on unmet needs in addiction treatment and leveraging strategic partnerships.

feed.title: Teledyne e2v Launches Caiman™ Imaging Module for Low Light Applications
feed.summary: Teledyne e2v has launched the Caiman™ imaging module, a compact, low-power solution designed for demanding low-light applications. Featuring the OnyxMax™ sensor, it offers high quantum efficiency, low noise, and operates at speeds exceeding 120 frames per second, consuming less than 1 watt. This module, suitable for night vision, surveillance, and scientific imaging, will be showcased at the SPIE Defense + Security event.

feed.title: UNFI workers ratify first contract at Florida warehouse
feed.summary: Over 200 UNFI warehouse workers in Pompano Beach, Florida, have ratified their first contract with the company after organizing with the Teamsters union last year. The five-year agreement includes a 31% wage increase and access to Teamsters health care and pension plans. This contract is part of a broader effort by the Teamsters to organize UNFI workers, now representing more than 5,500 nationwide.

feed.title: IZEA Worldwide Inc stock (US4660321096): Is its influencer platform model strong enough for steady growth?
feed.summary: This article examines whether IZEA Worldwide Inc's influencer platform model can sustain steady growth. It highlights IZEA's core business as a technology platform connecting brands with influencers, emphasizing its managed services and software tools. The piece discusses IZEA's strategic alignment with industry trends, its competitive position, and its relevance to investors in English-speaking markets, while also addressing key risks and open questions for the company.

feed.title: Freightos (CRGO) VP disposes shares in RSU-related tax sale
feed.summary: Andrea Indave Sesma, VP of Human Resources at Freightos Ltd (CRGO), disposed of 846 Ordinary Shares on April 16, 2026, at $1.85 per share. These transactions were "sale-to-cover" sales to meet tax liabilities arising from vesting restricted share units (RSUs). Following these dispositions, she retains significant equity holdings, including Ordinary Shares and stock options with various exercise prices and expiration dates.

feed.title: Essex Property Trust raises quarterly dividend by 0.8% to $2.59/share
feed.summary: Essex Property Trust (ESS) has increased its quarterly dividend by 0.8%, raising it to $2.59 per share. This adjustment results in an annualized dividend of $10.36 per share, maintaining the company's long-standing history of consistent dividend growth. The company will distribute this dividend on April 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 31, 2026.

feed.title: News - April 21, 2026 Announcement Regarding the Future Business Direction of Sony Honda Mobility
feed.summary: Sony, Honda, and their joint venture, Sony Honda Mobility (SHM), have decided to scale down SHM's operations and review its structure. This decision follows Honda's reassessment of its electrification strategy and the discontinuation of the AFEELA model development, as they found it difficult to bring products aligned with SHM's founding purpose to market in the short to medium term under the current framework. Employees are expected to be reassigned, but the companies remain committed to exploring future collaboration for mobility innovation.

feed.title: Meet Blackstone's 'accidental influencer’ who made LinkedIn jogs Wall Street’s must‑watch content
feed.summary: Jonathan Gray, President and COO of Blackstone, has become an "accidental influencer" on LinkedIn through his authentic jogging videos, offering insights into investing and global trends. These casual, unpolished dispatches have garnered millions of views, proving more effective than highly produced content in communicating Blackstone's reach and building trust. Gray's success highlights a growing trend among C-suite executives to engage directly on social media, demonstrating a new demand for leaders who double as "creator-in-chiefs."

feed.title: Teledyne's new camera module sees in near-dark on under 1 watt
feed.summary: Teledyne e2v has launched its Caiman imaging module, a compact, low-power solution designed for very low-light near-infrared imaging. The module features the OnyxMax sensor, high quantum efficiency, low noise, and integrated image processing, operating on less than 1 watt of power. It targets applications such as night vision, surveillance, and scientific imaging and will be showcased at SPIE Defense + Security.
